Home / Services / Garage Door Replacement

Garage Door Replacement

Beautiful, durable new doors designed for Vegas homes.

When repairs no longer make sense, we'll guide you through selecting and installing a new garage door that complements your home's style while standing up to our harsh climate. For Summerlin's luxury homes, we offer premium insulated doors that help regulate garage temperatures. In Henderson's active adult communities, we install quiet-operating doors perfect for early morning use.

We carry doors with special features for our area: UV-resistant finishes that won't fade, dust-proof bottom seals, and thermal breaks to prevent warping. For North Las Vegas' newer construction, we match builder-grade styles while improving durability.

Our installation process includes proper insulation around the frame - crucial for keeping out desert dust and maintaining energy efficiency. We'll handle everything from removing your old door to programming your opener and cleaning up afterward.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Consultation to discuss style, material, and insulation options
  2. 02 Step 2: Precise measurements of your garage opening
  3. 03 Step 3: Professional removal of old door and tracks
  4. 04 Step 4: Installation of new system with weather sealing

Benefits

  • Increased curb appeal and home value
  • Better temperature control for your garage
  • Reduced dust infiltration
  • Modern safety features

Frequently Asked Questions

What's the best material for Las Vegas heat?

Steel doors with thermal breaks perform well, as do composite materials. We avoid all-wood doors which warp in our dry climate. Insulation is key for temperature control.

How long does installation take?

Most standard replacements are completed in 4-6 hours. We schedule installations early to avoid the hottest part of the day.

Will a new door help with energy bills?

Yes! Properly insulated garage doors can reduce heat transfer, especially important if your garage shares walls with living spaces.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with garage door replacement? Contact us today.
